headline: AI builds your app pipeline
subheadline: Route local-model commands into content, assets, commits, and Cloudflare-ready builds from one workspace.

sections.title: Command-first publishing
sections.description: Send structured JSON actions to a router that validates intent before touching the workspace.

sections.title: Local AI orchestration
sections.description: Use Ollama-hosted models for code, reasoning, analysis, and content generation without leaving the repo.

sections.title: Deploy from source control
sections.description: Every accepted content mutation can stage, commit, and push for Cloudflare Pages to rebuild automatically.
